description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined blue fuselage and a clear, enclosed cockpit canopy. The wings are straight and low-mounted, featuring red and blue accent stripes near the tips, and the tail section is adorned with a tricolor pattern. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is smoothly integrated into the fuselage. The tail assembly is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The overall design suggests a light, agile aircraft suitable for personal or sport use.
description: A small blue single-propeller airplane with a clear cockpit, low straight wings, and fixed landing gear. Red and blue accents highlight the wingtips and tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, clear cockpit canopy, low-mounted straight wing, and fixed landing gear with visible propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the triangular wing shape, tricolor tail fin, and the symmetry of the horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit, propeller, and the tail wheel, with the tricolor tail pattern visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the full wingspan, cockpit placement, and the color accents on the wingtips and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger configuration with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
